assertions.assertion: Uses ConfigureOpenIdConnect with Authority, ClientId, ClientSecret, ResponseType='code', and SaveTokens=true
Middleware order is UseRouting -> UseAuthentication -> UseBff -> UseAuthorization
assertions.rationale: Correct middleware order: UseRouting, UseAuthentication, UseBff, UseAuthorization

assertions.assertion: Does NOT manually call AddAuthentication().AddCookie().AddOpenIdConnect() — uses the v4 fluent API instead
assertions.rationale: Uses ConfigureOpenIdConnect and ConfigureCookies, no manual AddAuthentication/AddCookie/AddOpenIdConnect
